Localization.Description: A user approved their own merge request

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A merge into branch {object.new_value} of project {datafield2}/{datafield1} is done by merge request !{numfield3} approved only by request author {subject.account.name}
User {subject.account.name} approved their own merge request !{numfield3} to branch {object.new_value} of project {datafield2}/{datafield1}
